metadata.description: Newsflash — real-time corroborated news events + 5-year archive, for agents

plugins.name: newsflash
plugins.description: Query a deduped global news event graph (260+ sources, 10 categories, 5-year archive) over MCP, with a real-time SSE stream and semantic search. Keyless test tier works instantly; set NEWSFLASH_API_KEY for higher limits.
